zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Sinclair於1375年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓時，她的父親William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin47歲，母親Isabella Strathearn47歲。她於大約1390年與John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Sinclair于1375年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓时，她的父亲William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin47岁，母亲Isabella Strathearn47岁。她于大约1390年与John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Sinclair was born in 1375, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin, was 47 and her mother, Isabella Strathearn, was 47. She married John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton about 1390, in Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1450, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 75, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Sinclair est née en 1375, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabella Strathearn, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton environ 1390, à Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Sinclair 1375 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin 47 und ihre Mutter Isabella Strathearn 47. Sie hat um 1390 in Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Sinclair è nata il nel 1375 nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Isabella Strathearn, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton circa 1390, nel Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Sinclairが1375年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで生まれた時，父William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslinは47歳，母Isabella Strathearnは47歳であった。約1390年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアプレストンプアンスでJohn Seton 2nd Lord of Setonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで75歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Sinclair(이)가 1375년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Strathearn(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 대략 1390년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 플레스토파스에서 John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Sinclair nasceu em 1375, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Strathearn, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton aproximadamente 1390, em Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Sinclair родилась в 1375 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Strathearn, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton около 1390 г. в местности престонпанс, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

Se casó con John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton aproximadamente 1390, en Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1450, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
